TaskDescription: Participants vocalize visually presented text naturally. Text stimuli include sentences from JSUT corpus, novel excerpts, and game dialogues.
Instructions: Read the presented text aloud naturally at a comfortable pace. Speak clearly and naturally as you would in normal conversation.
EEGPlacementScheme: g.SCARABEO 64-channel cap; channels 62 and 63 are mastoid electrodes
Notes: Stored channels are 0-61 scalp EEG, 62-63 mastoid electrodes, 64-65 listening audio monitor, 66-67 speaking microphone monitor, 68-69 EOG pair, 70-71 upper-lip EMG pair, 72-73 lower-lip EMG pair, and 74 trigger.
